title: AI/ML Engineer - Lang Chain, Lang Graph and MCP
company_focus:
Healthcare technology, pharmacy benefits, and care delivery
services
description:
Requisition Number: 2344880 Optum is a global organization
that delivers care, aided by technology to help millions of
people live healthier lives. The work you do with our team
will directly improve health outcomes by connecting people
with the care, pharmacy benefits, data and resources they
need to feel their best. Here, you will find a culture
guided by inclusion, talented peers, comprehensive benefits
and career development opportunities. Come make an impact on
the communities we serve as you help us advance health
optimization on a global scale. Join us to start Caring.
Connecting. Growing together. Primary Responsibilities:

- Design and implement multi-agent AI systems using LangChain,
  LangGraph, MCP, and advanced memory architectures
- Build Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines
  including text chunking, embedding, indexing, and vector
  retrieval
- Develop and maintain AI agent orchestration frameworks,
  ensuring reliable tool use, memory updates, and agent to
  agent communication
- Integrate LLMs with enterprise systems through secure API
  patterns, prompt orchestration, and contextual memory
- Implement and optimize vector database solutions
- Architect production-reference AI pipelines on Azure using:
  - Azure Foundry (Azure AI Foundry) for model hosting,
    evaluation, and monitoring
  - Azure AI Search for hybrid retrieval, semantic search, and
    grounding
  - Azure Container Apps / Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) for
    scalable deployment
- Containerize and deploy AI systems using Docker, Azure
  Container Registry (ACR), and orchestrate using ACA/AKS
- Productionize agentic/RAG solutions with CI/CD,
  observability, autoscaling, and reliability best practices
- Collaborate with product and data engineering teams to
  deliver end-to-end AI capabilities
- Comply with the terms and conditions of the employment
  contract, company policies and procedures, and any and all
  directives (such as, but not limited to, transfer and/or
  re-assignment to different work locations, change in teams
  and/or work shifts, policies in regard to flexibility of
  work benefits and/or work environment, alternative work
  arrangements, and other decisions that may arise due to
  the changing business environment). The Company may adopt,
  vary or rescind these policies and directives in its
  absolute discretion and without any limitation (implied or
  otherwise) on its ability to do so

Required Qualifications:

- B.Tech./MCA/Graduation (15+ years of formal education,
  Correspondence courses are not relevant)
- 6+ years of total experience
- Experience with RAG architecture, including Vector storage
  and retrieval, Embedding pipelines, Query routing and
  relevance tuning
- Solid understanding of AI concepts, including multi-agent
  systems, Memory architectures, Reasoning & tool driven
  agents
- Hands-on expertise with: Lang Chain, Lang Graph and MCP
  (Model Context Protocol)
- Practical knowledge of vector databases and similarity
  search
- Proficient in Python, AI/ML libraries, and API development

Preferred Qualifications:

- Solid experience with Azure cloud, including:
  - Experience containerizing AI solutions using Docker
  - Azure AI Foundry / Azure OpenAI / Prompt Flow, Azure AI
    Search, Azure Container Apps, Azure
  - Kubernetes Service (AKS), Azure Container Registry (ACR)
  - Ability to deploy, scale, monitor, and produce AI workloads
    on cloud infrastructure
  - Familiarity with MLOps, CI/CD pipelines, and model lifecycle
    management

At UnitedHealth Group, our mission is to help people live
healthier lives and make the health system work better for
everyone. We believe everyone - of every race, gender,
sexuality, age, location and income - deserves the
opportunity to live their healthiest life. Today, however,
there are still far too many barriers to good health which
are disproportionately experienced by people of color,
historically marginalized groups and those with lower
incomes. We are committed to mitigating our impact on the
environment and enabling and delivering equitable care that
addresses health disparities and improves health outcomes -
an enterprise priority reflected in our mission.
responsibilities: Design and implement multi-agent AI systems using LangChain, LangGraph, MCP, and advanced memory architectures
Build Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines including text chunking, embedding, indexing, and vector retrieval
Develop and maintain AI agent orchestration frameworks with tool use, memory updates, and agent-to-agent communication
Integrate LLMs with enterprise systems through secure API patterns, prompt orchestration, and contextual memory
Implement and optimize vector database solutions for similarity search and retrieval
Architect production AI pipelines on Azure using Azure AI Foundry, Azure AI Search, and Azure Container Apps/AKS
Containerize and deploy AI systems using Docker, Azure Container Registry, and orchestrate using ACA/AKS
Productionize agentic/RAG solutions with CI/CD, observability, autoscaling, and reliability best practices
use_cases: Multi-agent AI systems for healthcare operations
Enterprise knowledge retrieval and search via RAG
AI agent orchestration with tool integration and memory
LLM integration with healthcare enterprise systems
Production AI pipelines on Azure cloud infrastructure
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role directly involves building and deploying multi-
agent AI systems using LangChain/LangGraph, implementing RAG
pipelines, and architecting production AI solutions. The
engineer will work hands-on with LLMs, agents, and AI
infrastructure throughout the development lifecycle.
